have h : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun (n : ℕ) => ((2 : ℚ) ^ n, (1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n, (1 : ℚ))) := by
    have h₁ : Function.Injective fun (n : ℕ) => ((2 : ℚ) ^ n, (1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n, (1 : ℚ)) := by
      intro n m h₂
      simp_all [pow_right_injective]
      <;>
      (try norm_num at *) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try
        {
          norm_cast at *
          <;>
          simp_all [pow_right_injective]
          <;>
          linarith
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          rcases n with (_ | _ | n) <;> rcases m with (_ | _ | m) <;>
          norm_num at * <;>
          (try ring_nf at *) <;>
          (try field_simp at *) <;>
          (try norm_cast at *) <;>
          (try simp_all [pow_right_injective]) <;>
          (try linarith)
        })
    exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective h₁
  have h₂ : (Set.range fun (n : ℕ) => ((2 : ℚ) ^ n, (1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n, (1 : ℚ))) ⊆ {
      (x, y, z) |
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    intro p hp
    rw [Set.mem_range] at hp
    rcases hp with ⟨n, rfl⟩
    have h₃ : ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ≠ 1 ∧ ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ≠ 1 ∧ (1 : ℚ) ≠ 1 → False := by
      intro h₄
      have h₅ := h₄.2.2
      norm_num at h₅
      <;> simp_all
    have h₄ : ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ≠ 1 ∧ ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ≠ 1 ∧ (1 : ℚ) ≠ 1 → False := by
      intro h₄
      have h₅ := h₄.2.2
      norm_num at h₅
      <;> simp_all
    by_cases h₅ : n = 0
    · subst h₅
      norm_num
      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try simp_all)
    · have h₆ : n ≥ 1 := by
        by_contra h₆
        have h₇ : n = 0 := by
          omega
        contradiction
      have h₇ : ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
        have h₈ : (2 : ℚ) ^ n > 1 := by
          have h₉ : (2 : ℚ) > 1 := by norm_num
          exact one_lt_pow h₉ (by
            omega)
        have h₉ : (2 : ℚ) ^ n ≠ 1 := by
          intro h₁₀
          linarith
        exact h₉
      have h₈ : ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
        have h₉ : ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) < 1 := by
          have h₁₀ : (1 / 2 : ℚ) < 1 := by norm_num
          exact pow_lt_one (by positivity) h₁₀ (by
            omega)
        have h₁₀ : ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
          intro h₁₁
          linarith
        exact h₁₀
      have h₉ : (1 : ℚ) ≠ 1 → False := by
        intro h₁₀
        norm_num at h₁₀
        <;> simp_all
      have h₁₀ : ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) * ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) * (1 : ℚ) = 1 := by
        have h₁₁ : ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) * ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) = 1 := by
          calc
            ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) * ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) = ((2 : ℚ) * (1 / 2 : ℚ)) ^ n := by
              rw [mul_pow]
            _ = 1 ^ n := by norm_num
            _ = 1 := by simp [one_pow]
        calc
          ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) * ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) * (1 : ℚ) = (((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) * ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) * (1 : ℚ) := by ring
          _ = 1 * (1 : ℚ) := by rw [h₁₁]
          _ = 1 := by norm_num
      have h₁₁ : ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) ^ 2 / ((((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) - 1) ^ 2 + (1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
        have h₁₂ : (1 : ℚ) - 1 = 0 := by norm_num
        have h₁₃ : (1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 = 0 := by
          simp [h₁₂]
          <;> norm_num
        have h₁₄ : ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) ^ 2 / ((((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
          have h₁₅ : ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) > 1 := by
            have h₁₆ : (2 : ℚ) > 1 := by norm_num
            exact one_lt_pow h₁₆ (by omega)
          have h₁₆ : ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) > 0 := by positivity
          have h₁₇ : ((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) < 1 := by
            have h₁₈ : (1 / 2 : ℚ) < 1 := by norm_num
            exact pow_lt_one (by positivity) h₁₈ (by omega)
          have h₁₈ : (((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) - 1 : ℚ) > 0 := by linarith
          have h₁₉ : (((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) - 1 : ℚ) < 0 := by linarith
          have h₂₀ : (((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) - 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by linarith
          have h₂₁ : (((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) - 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by linarith
          have h₂₂ : ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) ^ 2 / ((((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
            have h₂₃ : ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) ^ 2 / ((((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
              field_simp [h₂₁, h₂₀]
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> norm_num
              <;>
              (try
                {
                  nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℚ) < 2) n, pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℚ) < (1 / 2 : ℚ)) n]
                })
              <;>
              (try
                {
                  field_simp [h₂₁, h₂₀] at *
                  <;> ring_nf at *
                  <;> norm_num at *
                  <;> nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℚ) < 2) n, pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℚ) < (1 / 2 : ℚ)) n]
                })
            exact h₂₃
          exact h₂₂
        calc
          ((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) ^ 2 / ((((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) - 1) ^ 2 + (1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 = (((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) ^ 2 / ((((1 / 2 : ℚ) ^ n : ℚ)) - 1) ^ 2) + (1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 := by ring
          _ = 1 + (1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 := by rw [h₁₄]
          _ = 1 + 0 := by
            have h₂₀ : (1 : ℚ) - 1 = 0 := by norm_num
            have h₂₁ : (1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 = 0 := by
              simp [h₂₀]
              <;> norm_num
            rw [h₂₁]
            <;> norm_num
          _ = 1 := by norm_num
      simp_all [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
  exact Set.Infinite.mono h₂ h

have h : Set.Infinite { (x, y, z) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ | (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 } := by
    have h₁ : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun n : ℤ => (2, 1 / 2, 1)) := by
      have h₂ : Function.Injective fun n : ℤ => (2, 1 / 2, 1 : ℚ) := by
        intro a b h
        simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num at * <;> linarith
      exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective h₂
    have h₂ : Set.range (fun n : ℤ => ((2 : ℚ), (1 / 2 : ℚ), (1 : ℚ))) ⊆ { (x, y, z) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ | (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 } := by
      intro p hp
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_range] at hp ⊢
      rcases hp with ⟨n, rfl⟩
      norm_num [pow_two]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try field_simp) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try norm_cast) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try linarith)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          norm_num at *
          <;>
          simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          linarith
        })
    exact Set.Infinite.mono h₂ h₁
  simpa [Set.ext_iff] using h

have h : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun n : ℕ => ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1, (2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1, (2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1)) := by
    have h₁ : Function.Injective fun n : ℕ => ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1, (2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1, (2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1) := by
      intro n m hnm
      simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try norm_num at *) <;>
      (try field_simp at *) <;>
      (try ring_nf at *) <;>
      (try norm_cast at *) <;>
      (try
        {
          by_contra h
          have h₂ : n ≠ m := by intro h₂; simp_all
          have h₃ : (n : ℤ) ≠ (m : ℤ) := by exact_mod_cast h₂
          simp_all [add_left_inj]
          <;>
          (try ring_nf at *) <;>
          (try norm_num at *) <;>
          (try linarith)
          <;>
          (try
            {
              field_simp at *
              <;>
              ring_nf at *
              <;>
              norm_cast at *
              <;>
              linarith
            })
          <;>
          (try
            {
              norm_num at *
              <;>
              linarith
            })
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₂ : (n : ℤ) = (m : ℤ) := by
            field_simp at *
            <;>
            ring_nf at *
            <;>
            norm_cast at *
            <;>
            (try linarith)
            <;>
            (try
              {
                nlinarith
              })
          exact_mod_cast h₂
        }) <;>
      (try
        {
          nlinarith
        })
    exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective h₁
  have h₂ : Set.range (fun n : ℕ => ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1, (2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1, (2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1)) ⊆ {
      (x, y, z) |
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    intro p hp
    rcases hp with ⟨n, rfl⟩
    have h₃ : ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
      have h₄ : (n : ℚ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le n
      have h₅ : (2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) > 0 := by positivity
      have h₆ : (2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 > 1 := by linarith
      linarith
    have h₄ : ((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
      have h₅ : (n : ℚ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le n
      have h₆ : (-(n : ℚ) - 2 : ℚ) < 0 := by linarith
      have h₇ : (2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) < 0 := by
        apply div_neg_of_pos_of_neg
        · norm_num
        · linarith
      have h₈ : (2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 < 1 := by linarith
      linarith
    have h₅ : ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) * ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) * ((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) = 1 := by
      have h₆ : (n : ℚ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le n
      field_simp [add_assoc]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> field_simp [add_assoc]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_num
      <;>
      (try
        {
          nlinarith
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          linarith
        })
    have h₆ : (((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      have h₇ : (n : ℚ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le n
      have h₈ : ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) - 1 = (2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) := by ring
      have h₉ : ((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) - 1 = (2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) := by ring
      have h₁₀ : (((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 = (((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)) ^ 2 := by rw [h₈]
      have h₁₁ : (((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) : ℚ) ^ 2 / (((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 = (((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2)) ^ 2 := by rw [h₉]
      rw [h₁₀, h₁₁]
      have h₁₂ : (((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)) ^ 2 = (((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) / ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1))) ^ 2 := by
        field_simp [pow_two]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [pow_two]
        <;> ring_nf
      have h₁₃ : (((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2)) ^ 2 = (((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) / ((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2))) ^ 2 := by
        field_simp [pow_two]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [pow_two]
        <;> ring_nf
      rw [h₁₂, h₁₃]
      have h₁₄ : ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) / ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1)) = (n + 1 : ℚ) / 2 * ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ) := by
        field_simp
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp
        <;> ring_nf
      have h₁₅ : ((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) / ((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2)) = (-(n : ℚ) - 2 : ℚ) / 2 * ((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ) := by
        field_simp
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp
        <;> ring_nf
      rw [h₁₄, h₁₅]
      have h₁₆ : ((n + 1 : ℚ) / 2 * ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ)) ^ 2 + ((n + 1 : ℚ) / 2 * ((2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) + 1 : ℚ)) ^ 2 + (((-(n : ℚ) - 2 : ℚ) / 2 * ((2 : ℚ) / (-(n : ℚ) - 2) + 1 : ℚ))) ^ 2 = 1 := by
        have h₁₇ : (n : ℚ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le n
        field_simp [add_assoc]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [add_assoc]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
        <;>
        (try
          {
            nlinarith
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            linarith
          })
      linarith
    refine' ⟨_, _, _⟩ <;>
    (try simp_all) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        ring_nf at *
        <;>
        field_simp at *
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        linarith
      })
  exact Set.Infinite.mono h₂ h

have h : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun n : ℕ => ((2 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-(1 / 2 : ℚ)))) := by
    have h₁ : Function.Injective fun n : ℕ => ((2 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-(1 / 2 : ℚ))) := by
      intro n m h
      simp_all
    exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective h₁
  have h₁ : Set.range (fun n : ℕ => ((2 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-(1 / 2 : ℚ)))) ⊆ {
    (x, y, z) |
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    intro p hp
    simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hp ⊢
    rcases hp with ⟨n, rfl⟩
    refine' ⟨2, -1, -1 / 2, _⟩
    constructor
    · -- Prove that x ≠ 1, y ≠ 1, z ≠ 1
      norm_num
    · constructor
      · -- Prove that x * y * z = 1
        norm_num
      · -- Prove that the sum of squares equals 1
        norm_num [div_eq_mul_inv]
        <;> field_simp <;> ring_nf <;> norm_num
  exact Set.Infinite.mono h₁ h

have h : Set.Infinite { (x, y, z) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ | (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 } := by
    have h₁ : ∀ n : ℕ, (∀ (n : ℕ), (2 : ℚ) ≠ 1 ∧ (-1 : ℚ) ≠ 1 ∧ (-1 / 2 : ℚ) ≠ 1) := by
      intro n
      norm_num
    -- We provide an infinite family of solutions parameterized by n.
    have h₂ : ∀ n : ℕ, ((n + 2 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-1 / (n + 2 : ℚ))) ∈ { (x, y, z) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ | (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 } := by
      intro n
      have h₃ : ((n + 2 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-1 / (n + 2 : ℚ))) ∈ { (x, y, z) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ | (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 } := by
        have h₄ : (n + 2 : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
          norm_cast
          <;> intro h₅
          <;> norm_num at h₅ <;> omega
        have h₅ : (-1 : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by norm_num
        have h₆ : (-1 / (n + 2 : ℚ)) ≠ 1 := by
          have h₇ : (n + 2 : ℚ) > 0 := by positivity
          have h₈ : (-1 / (n + 2 : ℚ)) < 0 := by
            exact div_neg_of_neg_of_pos (by norm_num) h₇
          linarith
        have h₇ : (n + 2 : ℚ) * (-1 : ℚ) * (-1 / (n + 2 : ℚ)) = 1 := by
          field_simp
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> norm_cast
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> norm_num
          <;> linarith
        have h₈ : ((n + 2 : ℚ) : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((n + 2 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (-1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((-1 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (-1 / (n + 2 : ℚ)) ^ 2 / ((-1 / (n + 2 : ℚ)) - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
          have h₉ : (n + 2 : ℚ) > 0 := by positivity
          field_simp [h₄, h₅, h₆]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [h₉.ne']
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> norm_cast
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> norm_num
          <;> nlinarith
        exact ⟨⟨h₄, h₅, h₆⟩, by simpa using h₇, by simpa using h₈⟩
      exact h₃
    -- The family of solutions is infinite because it is parameterized by n : ℕ.
    have h₃ : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun n : ℕ => ((n + 2 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-1 / (n + 2 : ℚ)))) := by
      have h₄ : Function.Injective fun n : ℕ => ((n + 2 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-1 / (n + 2 : ℚ))) := by
        intro n m h₅
        simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_cast at *
        <;> field_simp at *
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> norm_cast at *
        <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try {
            nlinarith
          }) <;>
          (try {
            linarith
          })
      exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective h₄
    have h₄ : (Set.range fun n : ℕ => ((n + 2 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-1 / (n + 2 : ℚ)))) ⊆ { (x, y, z) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ | (x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 } := by
      intro p hp
      rcases hp with ⟨n, rfl⟩
      exact h₂ n
    exact Set.Infinite.mono h₄ h₃
  -- The set is infinite because it contains an infinite subset.
  simpa [Set.Infinite] using h

have h_main : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun n : ℕ => (2, -1, -1 / 2 : ℚ)) := by
    have h : Function.Injective fun n : ℕ => (2, -1, -1 / 2 : ℚ) := by
      intro n m hnm
      simp_all
    exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective h
  
  have h_subset : Set.range (fun n : ℕ => (2, -1, -1 / 2 : ℚ)) ⊆ {
    (x, y, z) |
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1)
  } := by
    intro p hp
    rcases hp with ⟨n, rfl⟩
    constructor
    · -- Prove that 2 ≠ 1, -1 ≠ 1, -1/2 ≠ 1
      norm_num
    · constructor
      · -- Prove that 2 * (-1) * (-1/2) = 1
        norm_num
      · -- Prove that 2²/(2-1)² + (-1)²/(-1-1)² + (-1/2)²/(-1/2 -1)² = 1
        norm_num [div_eq_mul_inv]
        <;>
        ring_nf at * <;>
        norm_num <;>
        field_simp <;>
        ring_nf <;>
        norm_num
  
  -- Use the fact that the range of the function is infinite and a subset of the desired set to conclude that the set is infinite.
  exact Set.Infinite.mono h_subset h_main

classical
  have h_main : Set.Infinite { (x, y, z) | (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ) (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) (h₁ : x * y * z = 1) (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    -- Define a family of solutions parameterized by t ∈ ℕ
    have h : ∀ (t : ℕ), (t + 2 : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
      intro t
      norm_num [add_assoc]
      <;> positivity
    -- For each t ∈ ℕ, construct a solution (t, t, 1/t²)
    have h₁ : ∀ (t : ℕ), ∃ (x y z : ℚ), x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1 ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      intro t
      use (t + 2 : ℚ), (t + 2 : ℚ), 1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ))
      have h₂ : (t + 2 : ℚ) ≠ 1 := by
        norm_num [add_assoc] at t ⊢
        <;> positivity
      have h₃ : (1 : ℚ) / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ)) ≠ 1 := by
        have h₄ : (t + 2 : ℚ) ≥ 2 := by
          norm_cast
          <;> linarith
        have h₅ : (1 : ℚ) / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ)) < 1 := by
          have h₆ : (t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ) ≥ 4 := by
            nlinarith
          have h₇ : (1 : ℚ) / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ)) ≤ 1 / 4 := by
            apply (div_le_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)).mpr
            nlinarith
          have h₈ : (1 : ℚ) / 4 < 1 := by norm_num
          linarith
        linarith
      have h₄ : (t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ) * (1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ))) = 1 := by
        field_simp [h₂]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
        <;> field_simp [h₂]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
      have h₅ : (t + 2 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (t + 2 : ℚ) ^ 2 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) - 1) ^ 2 + (1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ))) ^ 2 / ( (1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ))) - 1 ) ^ 2 = 1 := by
        have h₆ : (t + 2 : ℚ) ≥ 2 := by
          norm_cast
          <;> linarith
        have h₇ : (t + 2 : ℚ) - 1 ≠ 0 := by
          have h₈ : (t + 2 : ℚ) ≠ 1 := h₂
          intro h₉
          apply h₈
          linarith
        have h₈ : (1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ)) : ℚ) - 1 ≠ 0 := by
          have h₉ : (1 : ℚ) / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ)) < 1 := by
            have h₁₀ : (t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ) ≥ 4 := by
              nlinarith
            have h₁₁ : (1 : ℚ) / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ)) ≤ 1 / 4 := by
              apply (div_le_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)).mpr
              nlinarith
            have h₁₂ : (1 : ℚ) / 4 < 1 := by norm_num
            linarith
          have h₁₀ : (1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ)) : ℚ) - 1 < 0 := by linarith
          linarith
        field_simp [h₇, h₈]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [h₂]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
        <;> field_simp [h₂]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
        <;> nlinarith
      exact ⟨h₂, h₂, h₃, by
        -- Prove that x * y * z = 1
        have h₅ : (t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ) * (1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ))) = 1 := by
          field_simp [h₂]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> norm_num
          <;> field_simp [h₂]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> norm_num
        calc
          (t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ) * (1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ))) = 1 := h₅
          _ = 1 := by norm_num
        , by
        -- Prove that x²/(x-1)² + y²/(y-1)² + z²/(z-1)² = 1
        simpa [add_assoc] using h₅⟩
    -- Show that the constructed solutions are distinct for distinct t
    have h₂ : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun t : ℕ => ((t + 2 : ℚ), (t + 2 : ℚ), 1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ)))) := by
      have h₃ : Function.Injective fun t : ℕ => ((t + 2 : ℚ), (t + 2 : ℚ), 1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ))) := by
        intro t₁ t₂ h₄
        simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_cast at *
        <;> field_simp at *
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> norm_cast at *
        <;> nlinarith
      exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective h₃
    -- Show that all constructed solutions are in the set
    have h₃ : (Set.range fun t : ℕ => ((t + 2 : ℚ), (t + 2 : ℚ), 1 / ((t + 2 : ℚ) * (t + 2 : ℚ)))) ⊆ { (x, y, z) | (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ) (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) (h₁ : x * y * z = 1) (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
      intro p hp
      rcases hp with ⟨t, rfl⟩
      have h₄ : ∃ (x y z : ℚ), x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1 ∧ x * y * z = 1 ∧ x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1 := h₁ t
      rcases h₄ with ⟨x, y, z, hx, hy, hz, hxyz, hsum⟩
      refine' ⟨x, y, z, hx, hy, hz, hxyz, hsum⟩
    -- Conclude that the set is infinite
    exact Set.Infinite.mono h₃ h₂
  exact h_main

have h_main : Set.Infinite { (x, y, z) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ | (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ) (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) (h₁ : x * y * z = 1) (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    have h : Set.Infinite (Set.range fun n : ℕ => ((0 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ))) := by
      have h₁ : Function.Injective fun n : ℕ => ((0 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ)) := by
        intro n m h
        simp_all
      exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective h₁
    have h₂ : (Set.range fun n : ℕ => ((0 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ), (-1 : ℚ))) ⊆ { (x, y, z) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ | (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ) (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) (h₁ : x * y * z = 1) (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
      intro p hp
      simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hp ⊢
      rcases hp with ⟨n, rfl⟩
      refine' ⟨0, -1, -1, _⟩
      constructor
      · -- Prove that 0 ≠ 1, -1 ≠ 1, -1 ≠ 1
        norm_num
      · constructor
        · -- Prove that 0 * (-1) * (-1) = 1
          norm_num
        · -- Prove that 0^2 / (0 - 1)^2 + (-1)^2 / (-1 - 1)^2 + (-1)^2 / (-1 - 1)^2 = 1
          norm_num
    exact Set.Infinite.mono h₂ h
  
  -- The set in the problem statement is the same as the set in h_main, just written in a different syntactic form.
  -- Since h_main proves that the set is infinite, we can directly use this fact to conclude the proof.
  have h_final : Set.Infinite {
    (x, y, z) |
    (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
    (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
    (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
    (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
    -- Use the fact that the set in h_main is infinite to conclude that the set in the problem statement is also infinite.
    have h₁ : { (x, y, z) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ | (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ) (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1) (h₁ : x * y * z = 1) (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } = {
      (x, y, z) |
      (x : ℚ) (y : ℚ) (z : ℚ)
      (h₀ : x ≠ 1 ∧ y ≠ 1 ∧ z ≠ 1)
      (h₁ : x * y * z = 1)
      (h₂ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 + y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 + z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = 1) } := by
      ext ⟨x, y, z⟩
      simp [exists_prop]
      <;>
      (try { aesop }) <;>
      (try {
        aesop
      }) <;>
      (try {
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        aesop
      })
    rw [h₁] at h_main
    exact h_main
  exact h_final
